title: dianthus scaber subsp. toletanus
intro: Dianthus scaber subsp. toletanus, a subspecies of the Dianthus scaber plant, is a flowering perennial native to India, commonly known as the Toletan pink. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and providing antioxidant properties. Dianthus scaber subsp. toletanus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to fully explore its benefits and uses.
